name: e2e config: the chosen option's build units cover database, scaling, and security concerns
command:
cat > profile.json <<'JEOF'
{"complete":true,"answers":{"workload":"an online appointment booking app for a medical clinic","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"hipaa","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"analytics","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"external-partner","data_cadence":"real-time"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" --vision "medical booking" --profile profile.json --out-dir sess --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const o=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("sess/architecture-options.json","utf8"));const opt=o.options.find(x=>x.option_id===o.recommended_option_id)||o.options[0];const br=opt.build_requirements;process.exit(br.includes("encryption_at_rest")&&br.includes("multi_az")&&br.includes("autoscaling")?0:1)' && echo build-covers-config 1>&2
